ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for identification */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the economy to which the company belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry category of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with this price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the stock */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock in pre-market trading */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* Price of the stock in after-hours trading */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., exchange, API provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the trading takes place */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., regular, extended hours) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade transaction */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade transaction */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were traded */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, pending, canceled) */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, manual) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Base date for the index */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index on the base date */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., broad market, sector) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the index information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_values" (
  "index_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index value record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index associated with this value */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the index value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the index on this date */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in index value from the previous day */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in index value from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_values_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., news agency, financial publication) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the alert */,
  "price_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was set */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user logged in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address used to log in */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to log in (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance check was performed */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check (e.g., data integrity, user access) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the strategy was created */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the strategy */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics associated with the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
